name: Richard Rohr
bio: Richard Rohr is a Franciscan friar and the founder of the Center for Action and Contemplation in Albuquerque, New Mexico. He is an internationally recognized teacher on contemplative Christianity, drawing on the mystical traditions of Christianity alongside wisdom from other traditions. His books, including 'Falling Upward,' 'The Universal Christ,' and 'Everything Belongs,' have made him one of the most widely read Christian contemplative authors. His daily meditation emails reach hundreds of thousands of subscribers.
